# Dirac AI Lab

> Production-grade AI systems for healthcare, e-commerce, and enterprise.

Dirac AI Lab designs, builds, and deploys custom AI systems that run in production. We specialize in voice AI agents, LLM integration, recommendation engines, classification models, and MLOps pipelines.

## Services

- **Voice AI Agents** — Custom conversational voice agents for inbound support, scheduling, sales, and healthcare triage. Built to handle real call volume at scale.
- **OpenClaw Setup & LLM Integration** — Full OpenClaw deployment and LLM integration tailored to your stack. Model selection, tool configuration, and business system connectivity.
- **Healthcare AI** — Patient scheduling, clinical triage, and workflow automation with a focus on data privacy and security.
- **Recommendation Systems** — Personalized engines for e-commerce, content platforms, and SaaS using embeddings and real-time inference.
- **Classification Models** — Custom ML pipelines for fraud detection, churn prediction, document classification, and anomaly detection.
- **MLOps & Model Lifecycle** — CI/CD for ML, automated retraining, drift detection, model monitoring, and cloud deployment across AWS, GCP, and Azure.

## Why Dirac AI Lab

- Security-first architecture — encrypted pipelines, audit logging, data privacy by design
- Production-grade only — every system is load-tested and built for real traffic
- White-glove onboarding — full training, documentation, and support until your team owns it
- 100% custom — no templates, every system is designed for your specific use case
